assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Configuration uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for BFCM period from Nov 15-Dec 15 (30 days), which blocks all upgrades including patches

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Configuration uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for June code freeze from June 1-30, blocking all upgrades

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Uses no_minor_or_node_upgrades scope with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support for persistent minor version control, explaining it blocks both control plane minor upgrades AND node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'no_upgrades exclusions have a 30-day maximum' and shows the persistent exclusion tracks until version EoS in the table

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: All gcloud commands include specific --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags: no_minor_or_node_upgrades for persistent control, no_upgrades for both freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Only mentions 'Maximum 3 no_upgrades exclusions per cluster' but does not mention the 48h maintenance requirement in any 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Manual upgrades bypass ALL exclusions' and provides manual upgrade commands

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not warn about risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods, only mentions EoS enforcement is honored but delayed
